title: <div>Then save your completed Week 1 Weekly Writing Warm-Up using the proper nam
content:
Then save your completed Week 1 Weekly Writing Warm-Up using the proper naming convention.

Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 5 minutes.

Completion
  1. The naming convention is ENG101_wk#_warm_up_firstintiallastname_date—for example, ENG101_wk1_warm_up_jsmith_mmddyyyy.
  2. Submit the Week 1 Weekly Writing Warm-Up by the end of the week. See the video below to review the process.

 

After you submit your assignment, click Next to complete the Week 1 Discussion.
Points
100
Submitting
a text entry box or a file upload
